types.definition: The deployable application as a whole.
detection_rules: Instantiate Application only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A cohesive package, directory, or layer grouping source constructs.
detection_rules: Instantiate Module only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A framework or runtime entry into application code.
detection_rules: Instantiate EntryPoint only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A user-facing or external-facing surface such as a route or page.
detection_rules: Instantiate Interface only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A multi-step user or system activity evidenced by related actions/views/data access.
detection_rules: Instantiate Flow only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A controller, handler, or operation that responds to an entrypoint or route.
detection_rules: Instantiate Action only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A rendered user-facing template or screen.
detection_rules: Instantiate View only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A reusable source-level implementation unit such as a service, DAO, utility, or form.
detection_rules: Instantiate Component only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A domain object or transfer object represented by model/form classes.
detection_rules: Instantiate DataObject only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A persistence target such as a database, table, or configured JDBC store.
detection_rules: Instantiate DataStore only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A validation, authorization, or business constraint enforced by configuration or code.
detection_rules: Instantiate Rule only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A dependency or external technology boundary used by the application.
detection_rules: Instantiate Integration only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

detection_rules: Instantiate Job only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: Runtime or build-time configuration that shapes application behavior.

required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

detection_rules: Instantiate SecurityElement only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.

types.definition: A source-backed construct whose application meaning remains unresolved.
detection_rules: Instantiate UnknownSemanticConstruct only when a source node or file evidence directly supports the construct.
required_evidence: At least one local source file path and span or source-node id.
optional_evidence: Corroborating Java class, XML mapping, JSP template, dependency, or documentation catalog evidence.
